com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

Class VariableList

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.VariableList
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable

    public class VariableList
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Cloneable, java.io.Serializable

    save Variable with singular data. Variable can be referred through Identifier(name) or location(index).

    VariableList both provide Java java.util.Map supported reference using Identifier(name) and java.util.List supported reference using location(index).

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan
    See Also:
    Variable, Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      VariableList()
      basic creator.

        Returns:
        duplicated object
